name: ranch-agent-extension
description: Premium rail control room visualization for Claude multi-agent runtime

expeditionSituationRoom.runtimeJsonlPath.description: Absolute path to Claude JSONL runtime transcript to watch.

expeditionSituationRoom.mainBranchDetect.description: Detect whether agent activity is occurring on protected main branches.
Branch names treated as protected main branches.
Regex pattern for agent IDs to exclude from main-branch risk alerts (for example, your own coordinator agent).

expeditionSituationRoom.debug.unmappedSk.description: Enable local NDJSON logging for events that map to skill 'other' (or have no tool name) to improve skill mapping rules.
Where to write unmapped-skill debug logs. Absolute paths are used as-is. Relative paths resolve from the base set by debug.unmappedSkillLog.relativeBase.
Base directory for relative debug.unmappedSkillLog.filePath. 'global' stores logs in extension global storage; 'workspace' stores logs in the opened project.
Maximum number of detail characters written per unmapped-skill record. Set 0 to omit detail text.
Which unmapped-skill reasons to capture in debug log records.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.enabled.description: Enable local HTTP hook receiver for Claude hooks.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.bind.description: Bind address for the local HTTP hook receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.port.description: TCP port for the local HTTP hook receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.path.description: HTTP path for receiving Claude hook POST requests.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.authTok.description: Optional Bearer token required by the HTTP hook receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.rawLog..description: Enable raw HTTP hook payload NDJSON logging.
Where to write raw HTTP hook payload logs. Relative paths resolve from httpHook.rawLog.relativeBase.

expeditionSituationRoom.httpHook.mergeMo.description: Merge strategy when JSONL and HTTP hook events overlap.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.enabl.description: Enable the local Claude statusLine bridge receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.bind.description: Bind address for the local statusLine bridge receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.port.description: TCP port for the local statusLine bridge receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.path.description: HTTP path for receiving Claude statusLine snapshots.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.authT.description: Optional Bearer token required by the statusLine bridge receiver.

expeditionSituationRoom.statusline.rawLo.description: Enable raw Claude statusLine payload NDJSON logging.
Where to write raw statusLine payload logs. Relative paths resolve from statusline.rawLog.relativeBase.
